props.name: compact
props.description: Displays the Accordion as compact version with thinner border and smaller paddings.

props.name: heading
props.description: Defines the heading used in accordion.

props.name: headingTag
props.description: Sets a heading tag, so it fits correctly within the outline of the page.

props.name: open
props.description: Defines if accordion is open.

props.name: size
props.description: The text size.

props.name: tag
props.description:
[DEPRECATED] , will be removed with next major release, use `heading-tag` instead.
Sets a heading tag, so it fits correctly within the outline of the page.

props.name: theme
props.description: Adapts the color when used on dark background.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Default slot for the main content

slots.name: heading
slots.description: Defines the heading used in the accordion. Can be used alternatively to the heading prop. Please **refrain** from using any other than text content as slotted markup.

props.name: description
props.description: Description of the banner.

props.name: dismissButton
props.description: If false, the banner will not have a dismiss button.

props.name: heading
props.description: Heading of the banner.

props.name: headingTag
props.description: Sets a heading tag, so it fits correctly within the outline of the page.

props.name: open
props.description: If true, the banner is open.

props.name: persistent
props.description:
[DEPRECATED] since v3.0.0, will be removed with next major release, use `dismissButton` instead.
Defines if the banner can be closed/removed by the user.

props.name: state
props.description: State of the banner.

props.name: theme
props.description: Adapts the banner color depending on the theme.

props.name: width
props.description: [DEPRECATED] Has no effect anymore

slots.name: description
slots.description: Defines the description used in the banner. Can be used alternatively to the description prop. Can be used for rich content.

slots.name: heading
slots.description: Defines the heading used in the banner. Can be used alternatively to the heading prop. Can be used for rich content.

slots.name: title
slots.description: [DEPRECATED] Please use the heading prop or slot="heading" instead.

props.name: activeSlideIndex
props.description: Defines which slide to be active (zero-based numbering).

props.name: alignControls
props.description: Alignment of slotted controls

props.name: alignHeader
props.description: Alignment of heading and description

props.name: aria
props.description: Add ARIA attributes.

props.name: description
props.description: Defines the description used in the carousel.

props.name: disablePagination
props.description:
[DEPRECATED] since v3.0.0, will be removed with next major release, use `pagination` instead.
If true, the carousel will not show pagination bullets at the bottom.

props.name: focusOnCenterSlide
props.description:
Indicates whether focus should be set on the center slide.
If true, the carousel loops by individual slide; otherwise, it loops by page.

props.name: gradientColor
props.description: Adapts the background gradient for the left and right edge.

props.name: heading
props.description: Defines the heading used in the carousel.

props.name: headingSize
props.description: Defines the heading size used in the carousel.

props.name: intl
props.description: Override the default wordings that are used for aria-labels on the next/prev buttons and pagination.

props.name: pagination
props.description: If false, the carousel will not show pagination bullets at the bottom.

props.name: rewind
props.description: Whether the slides should rewind from last to first slide and vice versa.

props.name: skipLinkTarget
props.description: Defines target of skip link (to skip carousel entries).

props.name: slidesPerPage
props.description: Sets the amount of slides visible at the same time. Can be set to `auto` if you want to define different widths per slide via CSS.

props.name: theme
props.description: Adapts the color when used on dark background.

props.name: trimSpace
props.description: Determines whether to trim spaces before/after the carousel if `focusOnCenterSlide` option is true.

props.name: width
props.description: Defines the outer spacings between the carousel and the left and right screen sides.

props.name: wrapContent
props.description: [DEPRECATED] Has no effect anymore

slots.name: controls
slots.description: Shows a sidebar area on the **start** side (**left** in **LTR** mode / **right** in **RTL** mode). On mobile view it transforms into a flyout.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Default slot for the carousel slides.

slots.name: description
slots.description: Shows a footer section, flowing under the content area when scrollable.

slots.name: heading
slots.description: Renders a heading above the carousel.

props.name: aria
props.description: A map of ARIA attributes to enhance the flag's accessibility. For example, use `{ 'aria-label': 'German flag' }` to provide a descriptive label for screen readers.

props.name: name
props.description: Specifies the country flag to display. Use the two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. For example, use `us` for the United States, `de` for Germany, `gb` for Great Britain.

props.name: size
props.description: The size of the flag. Pre-defined sizes are aligned with the Porsche Next typescale. Available values are `small`, `medium`, `large`, etc.

props.name: autoComplete
props.description: Provides a hint to the browser about what type of data the field expects, which can assist with autofill features (e.g., autocomplete='email').

props.name: compact
props.description: A boolean value that, if present, renders the input field as a compact version.

props.name: description
props.description: Supplementary text providing more context or explanation for the input.

props.name: disabled
props.description: A boolean value that, if present, makes the input field unusable and unclickable. The value will not be submitted with the form.

props.name: form
props.description: Specifies the id of the <form> element that the input belongs to (useful if the input is not a direct descendant of the form).

props.name: hideLabel
props.description: Controls the visibility of the label.

props.name: indicator
props.description: Controls the visibility of the email icon.

props.name: label
props.description: Text content for a user-facing label.

props.name: maxLength
props.description: A non-negative integer specifying the maximum number of characters the user can enter into the input.

props.name: message
props.description: Dynamic feedback text for validation or status.

props.name: minLength
props.description: A non-negative integer specifying the minimum number of characters required for the input's value to be considered valid.

props.name: multiple
props.description: A boolean value that, if present, it allows the user to enter a list of multiple email addresses, separated by commas (and optional whitespace). The browser will validate each email address in the list.

props.name: name
props.description: The name of the input field, used when submitting the form data.

props.name: pattern
props.description: Specifies a regular expression that the input's value must match for the value to pass constraint validation. This allows for more specific email validation rules than the browser's default (e.g., restricting to a specific domain). If provided, it overrides the browser's default email validation.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: A string that provides a brief hint to the user about what kind of information is expected in the field (e.g., placeholder='you@example.com'). This text is displayed when the input field is empty.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: A boolean value that, if present, makes the input field uneditable by the user, but its value will still be submitted with the form.

props.name: required
props.description: A boolean value that, if present, indicates that the input field must be filled out before the form can be submitted.

props.name: state
props.description: Indicates the validation or overall status of the input component.

props.name: theme
props.description: Controls the visual appearance of the component.

props.name: value
props.description: The default email address (or comma-separated list of addresses) for the input.

slots.name: description
slots.description: Shows a description. Only [phrasing content](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Guide/HTML/Content_categories#Phrasing_content) is allowed.

slots.name: end
slots.description: Shows content at the end of the input (e.g. toggle button, unit suffix).

slots.name: label
slots.description: Shows a label. Only [phrasing content](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Guide/HTML/Content_categories#Phrasing_content) is allowed.

slots.name: label-after
slots.description: Places additional content after the label text (for content that should not be part of the label, e.g. external links or `p-popover`).

slots.name: message
slots.description: Shows a state message. Only [phrasing content](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Guide/HTML/Content_categories#Phrasing_content) is allowed.

slots.name: start
slots.description: Shows content at the start of the input (e.g. unit prefix).

props.name: compact
props.description: Displays as compact version.

props.name: hideLabel
props.description: Show or hide label.

props.name: href
props.description: When providing an url then the component will be rendered as `<a>`.

props.name: icon
props.description: The icon shown.

props.name: iconSource
props.description: A URL path to a custom icon.

props.name: rel
props.description: Specifies the relationship of the target object to the link object.

props.name: target
props.description: Target attribute where the link should be opened.

props.name: theme
props.description: Adapts the link color when used on dark background.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Default slot to render the link label.

props.name: compact
props.description: A boolean value that, if present, renders the pin-code as a compact version.

props.name: description
props.description: The description text.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the Pin Code. No events will be triggered while disabled state is active.

props.name: form
props.description: The id of a form element the pin-code should be associated with.

props.name: hideLabel
props.description: Show or hide label and description text. For better accessibility it is recommended to show the label.

props.name: label
props.description: The label text.

props.name: length
props.description: Number of characters of the Pin Code.

props.name: loading
props.description: Disables the Pin Code and shows a loading indicator. No events will be triggered while loading state is active.

props.name: message
props.description: The message styled depending on validation state.

props.name: name
props.description: Name of the control.

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the Pin Code as required.

props.name: state
props.description: The validation state.

props.name: theme
props.description: Adapts the color depending on the theme.

props.name: type
props.description: Pin Code type.

props.name: value
props.description: Sets the initial value of the Pin Code.

slots.name: description
slots.description: Shows a description. Only [phrasing content](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Guide/HTML/Content_categories#Phrasing_content) is allowed.

slots.name: label
slots.description: Shows a label. Only [phrasing content](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Guide/HTML/Content_categories#Phrasing_content) is allowed.

slots.name: label-after
slots.description: Places additional content after the label text (for content that should not be part of the label, e.g. external links or `p-popover`).

slots.name: message
slots.description: Shows a state message. Only [phrasing content](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Guide/HTML/Content_categories#Phrasing_content) is allowed.

props.name: aria
props.description: Add ARIA attributes.

props.name: disableBackdropClick
props.description: If true, the sheet will not be closable via backdrop click.

props.name: dismissButton
props.description: If false, the sheet will not have a dismiss button.

props.name: open
props.description: If true, the sheet is open.

props.name: theme
props.description: Adapts the sheet color depending on the theme.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Default slot for the main content.

slots.name: header
slots.description: Renders a header section above the content area.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Default slot for the table row content.

props.name: theme
props.description: Adapts the toast color depending on the theme.

expectedNotes.propNotes: Single optional `visualizeGrid` boolean prop defaulting to `true`.
Single optional `visualizeGrid` boolean prop defaulting to `true`.
Eight public props including size/theme/heading/open/sticky; `headingTag` defaults to `h2`.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: Default content slot plus named `heading` slot.

expectedNotes.propNotes: Banner props include open, heading, description, state, dismissButton, persistent, width, and theme.
Nineteen public props cover layout, pagination, accessibility, theming, and deprecated compatibility flags.
expectedNotes.slotNotes: Default slide content plus named `controls`, `description`, `heading`, and dynamic `slide-${i}` slots.

expectedNotes.propNotes: Three public props: `name`, `size`, and the `aria` attribute map; `name` defaults to `de` and `size` defaults to `small`.
Twenty-one public props cover native email attributes, validation state, label and helper copy, theming, and required `name`.
Eight public props cover icon selection, link target/rel, compact and hideLabel state, and theme.
Fifteen public props cover label and description copy, form integration, validation state, length and type, and theme.

expectedNotes.slotNotes: Default content slot plus named `header` slot.
Default slot for the table row content.

expectedNotes.propNotes: Single `theme` prop; toast messages are supplied imperatively through `addMessage()` rather than props.
